footer_powered_by: Powered by Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI
upload_subtitle: okanye cofa ukuze ukhangele / usebenzise ikhamera
result_treatment_sub: Landela la manyathelo ukunyanga isityalo sakho
result_prevention_sub: Gcina isityalo sakho siphile ngala manyathelo
result_healthy_msg: Iindaba ezimnandi! Isityalo sakho sibonakala siphilile.
result_healthy_sub: Landela ezi cebo ukuze ukuhlale njalo.
result_at_risk_msg: Isityalo sakho asikaguli kodwa sibonisa iimpawu zokuqala zesilumkiso.
result_at_risk_sub: Yenza ngoku ukuze uthintele ukuba isifo singavela.
result_export_footer: Powered by AgroSense — Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI
error_unexpected_response: Server returned an unexpected response. Check Django logs.
error_network_prod_cross_origin: Cannot reach the API (wrong URL, CORS, or backend waking/sleeping on Render). Confirm VITE_API_BASE_URL has no typo; on Render set CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS to this site's exact https origin (and preview URLs if you use them). Retry after 30-60s on cold start.
error_network_prod_same_origin: Cannot reach the API. Same-origin /api should proxy via repo-root vercel.json. Update the rewrite destination to your Render URL, redeploy Vercel, or set VITE_API_BASE_URL to that URL and redeploy.
error_network_dev: Cannot reach the API. Local dev: (1) In backend: pip install -r requirements.txt && python manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:8000 (2) In frontend: npm run dev. Leave VITE_API_BASE_URL empty in frontend/.env so /api proxies to Django.
error_file_type: Nceda ulayishe umfanekiso we-jpg, png, okanye webp.
error_no_results: Akukho zityalo ezifanelekileyo. Zama umfanekiso ocacileyo.
history_empty: Akukho skeniso okwangoku. Skena isityalo sakho sokuqala!
history_empty_sub: Iingxelo zakho zangaphambili ziya kubonakala apha.
history_clear_confirm: Uqinisekile ufuna ukucima yonke imbali yeskena?
lab_precision_body: Iimodeli zethu zifundiswe ngezifundo ezingaphezulu kuka-500,000 zezityalo zasendaweni ezizinzileyo.
expert_insights_body: Fumana iingcebiso zokwelapha ngezinto eziphilayo kunye neenqanaba zokuthintela ngokukhawuleza.
camera_error_denied: Camera access denied. Please allow camera permissions and try again.
rightpanel_home_desc: Layisha umfanekiso wesityalo nanini na ufumane ukuxilongwa kwempilo okusekelwe ku-AI phantsi kwemizuzwana eyi-8.
rightpanel_result_desc: Phonononga imeko yempilo yesityalo ulandele iinyathelo ezincomisiwe ngezantsi.
rightpanel_tip_1: Thatha imifanekiso ekukhanyeni kwemvelo ukuze ukwazi umphumela omuhle
rightpanel_tip_3: Skena ngeveki ukuze ulandele ukuphila kwesityalo
rightpanel_tip_4: Yabelana ngempumelelo nomhloli wezolimo wendawo yakho
rightpanel_history_desc: Iihlola zakho ezili-20 zokugqibela zigcinwa ngokuzenzekelayo. Cofa nayiphi na ingenelo ukuze ubuyekeze ukuxilonga okupheleleyo.
rightpanel_history_auto_body: Sonke isihlola sigcinwa endaweni yakho kwisixhobo
rightpanel_settings_desc: Misela ulwimi kunye neenkcubeko zakho. Iisetingi zigcinwa ngokuzenzekelayo kwisixhobo sakho.
